title: Complicated
why_this_song: Complicated by Avril Lavigne (2002) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 18 times; first heard in: "And you're talking to me, one on one"
Appears 11 times; first heard in: "Somebody else 'round everyone else"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Somebody else 'round everyone else"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Uh-huh, life's like this"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Why do you have to go and make things so complicated?"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "you're" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "you're" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "else" in the whole song?

excerpts.text: Uh-huh, uh-huh, that's the way it is
Lay back, it's all been done before

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Avril Lavigne one question about "Complicated", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Avril Lavigne sobre "Complicated", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Complicated" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Complicated" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Complicated" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Complicated" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
